source.scope: Official-source-backed Guernsey Year of Charge 2026 individual standard-rate income tax on caller-confirmed chargeable income.

GG.notes: Year of Charge 2026 individual standard-rate tax at 22% on caller-confirmed chargeable income. Allowances, standard-charge elections, tax caps, social insurance and ETI administration remain outside scope.
